title: phillyrea media var. angustifolia
intro: Phillyrea media var. angustifolia, also known as Narrow-leaved Phillyrea, is a plant species within the Phillyrea genus, belonging to the family Oleaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional European folk medicine, where it has been used to treat various health issues. The Narrow-leaved Phillyrea has been reported to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, offering potential health benefits such as wound healing, skin protection, and the treatment of respiratory issues. In terms of herbal preparations, the leaves of the Narrow-leaved Phillyrea are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
